required_invariants: compile surface remains the native executable plus the existing compile wrapper
cache-hit claims remain coupled to compile-output provenance and runtime-launch-contract checks
incremental invalidation claims remain rooted in live compiler-emitted manifest and replay-key surfaces
macro-host cache claims remain fail-closed and compile-coupled
docs-generation throughput claims stay on the checked-in native docs and command-surface generators
allowed_moves: remove repeated wrapper or build invocations from heavyweight validation loops
reuse truthful wrapper cache entries when the live cache contract validates them
time direct native-executable compile loops when wrapper-launch semantics are not the guarantee under test
package the same live scripts and checked-in fixtures for end-to-end validation
disallowed_moves: no benchmark-only compiler executable or cache format
no cache-hit claim that bypasses compile-output provenance
no duplicate recovery-negative recompilation inside default validation tiers
no docs-throughput claim that omits the checked-in docs generators
no second public tier map outside the live runner and checked-in contracts
